meaning: n.[电]压电电阻率,压电电阻效应
examples: The influence of mechano-electric effect of CFRC on piezoresistivity can be ignored.
Results revealed that resistance of PP/EPDM/CB conductive composites strongly depends on uniaxial pressure, showing marked piezoresistivity behavior.
Piezoresistivity of ecac may involve proximity effect, microcrack and the staggered arrangements of conductive pass-ways due to shear strength of aggregates.
